nodes.title: MelBandRoFormer
widgets_values:
MelBandRoFormer is optional, but might help give better result since it extracts the vocal only, and remove any other background sounds 

https://huggingface.co/Kijai/MelBandRoFormer_comfy/tree/main

folder: models\diffusion_models

nodes.title: ID-Lora Prompt Guide
widgets_values:
[VISUAL]: <scene and appearance description>
[SPEECH]: <exact words the person should say>
[SOUNDS]: <speaker vocal style + ambient/environmental sounds>

nodes.title: FOR SINGLE PASS TURN OFF BOTH TOGGLES
About Video settings
widgets_values:
If low on Ram/Vram, try  768x512, 832x480 or 960x544.  With higher Vram you can try 1280x736 or 1920x1088

Width & height settings must be divisible by 32 + 1. 
Frame count must be divisible by 8 + 1. 

Running with invalid parameters **will not cause errors**. Instead, the flow will silently choose the closest valid parameters. 

**Length in seconds:**  try 5, 10 or 20. 

**FPS:** 24 or 25 (or 48 if your pc can run it)

nodes.title: Prompting LTX-2
widgets_values:
## LTX-2 Prompting Tips
1. **Core Actions**: Describe events and actions as they occur over time  
2. **Audio**: Describe sounds and dialogue needed for the scene  
3. **Reference Image**: Do not repeat details already present  
4. **Consistency**: Avoid instructions that do not match the reference image, as this will degrade results

nodes.title: About Prompt Enhancer (Optional)
widgets_values: This automagically enhances your prompt using the already loaded Gemma model. But it can be a bit sensitive to having correct Gemma if using GGUF models. Alternatively you can bypass/disable  this feature

text, subtitles, logo, still image, still video, no motion, static, frozen, blurry, low quality, distorted, bad anatomy, oversaturated, pixelated, low resolution, grainy, compression artifacts, jpeg artifacts, glitches, watermark, signature, copyright, deformed facial features, asymmetrical face, missing facial features, extra limbs, disfigured hands, blurry teeth, disfigured teeth, 
pc game, console game, video game, cartoon, ugly

nodes.title: Prompt
widgets_values:
[VISUAL]: 18 year old girl stands on a beach looking at the viewer, moving her arms behind her head.
[SPEECH]: Do you like my voice, it's generated with a lora id. 
[SOUNDS]: Low volume outdoors wave sounds in the background.

inputs.text: blurry, low quality, still frame, frames, watermark, overlay, titles, has blurbox, has subtitles
